HitPoints.Title: Punti ferita
HitPoints.Body: Hit Points measure how long you can stay in the fight. They reflect both actual injury tolerance and combat skill such as dodging, deflecting, and turning solid hits into less serious harm.

DamageThreshold.Title: Soglia danno
DamageThreshold.Body: Damage Threshold measures how much damage a single attack must inflict to seriously impair you. Even if you still have Hit Points left, a sufficiently powerful hit can reduce your effectiveness immediately.

ForcePoints.Title: Punti Forza
ForcePoints.Body: Force Points represent a character's ability to draw on unusual help, whether understood as destiny, luck, or the Force moving through living beings. They are a limited resource used to improve important actions.

DestinyPoints.Title: Punti Destino
DestinyPoints.Body: Rare points that let you automatically succeed on a roll or trigger special destiny effects.

ConditionTrack.Title: Condition Track
ConditionTrack.Body: Tracks penalties from taking heavy hits. Each step down applies cumulative -1 to all rolls and defenses.

BaseAttackBonus.Title: Base Attack Bonus
BaseAttackBonus.Body: Added to attack rolls. Determined by class and level.

Grapple.Title: Grapple
Grapple.Body: Used for grab and grapple checks. Based on BAB and size modifier.

Initiative.Title: Iniziativa
Initiative.Body: Initiative determines how fast you react when action starts. A higher result usually means acting earlier in the round.

ReflexDefense.Title: Difesa Riflessi
ReflexDefense.Body: Targeted by most attacks. Based on class, level, Dexterity or armor bonus.

FortitudeDefense.Title: Difesa Tempra
FortitudeDefense.Body: Resists physical effects like poison and stun. Based on class, level, and Constitution.

WillDefense.Title: Difesa Volontà
WillDefense.Body: Resists mental effects and Force powers. Based on class, level, and Wisdom.

FlatFooted.Title: Flat-Footed
FlatFooted.Body: Defense when caught off guard. Does not include Dexterity or dodge bonuses.

AbilityScore.Title: Ability Score
AbilityScore.Body: The raw score. The modifier (score minus 10, divided by 2) is what applies to rolls.

AbilityModifier.Title: Ability Modifier
AbilityModifier.Body: Derived from the ability score. Added to relevant rolls, skills, and defenses.

SkillTrained.Title: Trained Skill
SkillTrained.Body: Trained skills receive a +5 bonus and may unlock special uses not available untrained.

SkillRoll.Title: Skill Check
SkillRoll.Body: Click to roll this skill. The roll adds your modifier and training bonus.

PassiveTalent.Title: Passive Talent
PassiveTalent.Body: Always active. No action required to benefit from this talent.

ActiveTalent.Title: Active Talent
ActiveTalent.Body: Requires an action to use. Check the talent description for action type.

UsageLimit.Title: Limited Use
UsageLimit.Body: This ability can only be used a set number of times per encounter or per day.

WeaponAttack.Title: Attack Roll
WeaponAttack.Body: Click to roll an attack with this weapon against a target's Reflex Defense.

WeaponDamage.Title: Damage Roll
WeaponDamage.Body: Click to roll damage for this weapon after a successful attack.

ArmorPenalty.Title: Armor Penalty
ArmorPenalty.Body: This armor applies a penalty to Reflex Defense beyond the armor bonus and may restrict Dexterity.

ActionPalette.Title: Action Palette
ActionPalette.Body: Quick access to common combat and narrative actions for your character.

PaletteMode.Title: Palette Mode
PaletteMode.Body: Switches between combat actions and narrative/exploration actions.

ActionDisabled.Title: Action Unavailable
ActionDisabled.Body: This action cannot be used right now. Check prerequisites and available resources.

ChargenNarrative.Title: Narrative Mode
ChargenNarrative.Body: Build your character through guided story choices instead of manual stat selection.

ChargenMentor.Title: Mentor Selection
ChargenMentor.Body: Choose a mentor whose guidance shapes your character creation experience.

ChargenRollMethod.Title: Ability Score Method
ChargenRollMethod.Body: Select how to generate ability scores: roll dice, point buy, or standard array.

ChargenSpecies.Title: Specie
ChargenSpecies.Body: Your species determines base traits, ability adjustments, and available features.

ChargenClass.Title: Classe
ChargenClass.Body: Your class determines hit points, defenses, trained skills, and talent access.

ChargenLockin.Title: Finalize Character
ChargenLockin.Body: Confirms your choices. Most selections can still be adjusted after creation.

MentorDialogue.Title: Mentor Guidance
MentorDialogue.Body: Your mentor offers context and suggestions. This is advisory, not mandatory.

AurebeshTranslation.Title: Aurebesh Translation
AurebeshTranslation.Body: Text appears in Aurebesh first, then translates. Click to skip the effect.

TacticalOverlay.Title: Tactical Overlay
TacticalOverlay.Body: Shows range bands, threat areas, and tactical information on the map.

GMSuggestion.Title: GM Suggestion
GMSuggestion.Body: Advisory insight from the suggestion engine. Not applied automatically.

GMPaletteMode.Title: GM Mode
GMPaletteMode.Body: Switches the palette to GM tools: NPC spawning, healing, condition management.

Strength.Title: Forza
Strength.Body: Strength reflects how much force a character can apply physically. It is especially important in direct physical action and close-quarters power-based tasks.

Dexterity.Title: Destrezza
Dexterity.Body: Dexterity reflects fine control, reaction speed, and physical precision. It is especially valuable for ranged combat, evasive movement, and vehicle handling.

Constitution.Title: Costituzione
Constitution.Body: Constitution reflects how well a character withstands injury, fatigue, and bodily strain. It is a core survivability stat because it contributes to staying power.

Intelligence.Title: Intelligenza
Intelligence.Body: Intelligence reflects how well a character understands systems, solves problems, and develops trained expertise. It is especially useful for characters who rely on broad technical or academic skill.

Wisdom.Title: Saggezza
Wisdom.Body: Wisdom reflects perception, practical insight, and connection to surroundings. It is about awareness and sound judgment more than abstract analysis.

Charisma.Title: Carisma
Charisma.Body: Charisma reflects leadership, magnetism, confidence, and the ability to move others. It is not just appearance; it is the strength of a character's personal presence.

Acrobatics.Title: Acrobazia
Acrobatics.Body: Acrobatics covers balance, tumbling, safe falls, escaping physical holds, and agile movement. Use it when precision body control matters more than raw strength.

Climb.Title: Scalare
Climb.Body: Climb is used to ascend difficult surfaces such as rock faces, buildings, ladders, and machinery. It measures controlled upward movement through strength and grip.

Deception.Title: Inganno
Deception.Body: Deception is used to make falsehoods seem believable, create confusion, conceal intent, or present yourself as someone else. It covers bluffing, fast-talking, disguise, and forged evidence.

Endurance.Title: Resistenza
Endurance.Body: Endurance measures stamina and resilience under stress. Use it when a character must keep going through fatigue, hardship, or other physical extremes.

GatherInformation.Title: Raccogliere informazioni
GatherInformation.Body: Gather Information is used to ask around, work social networks, and uncover leads. It helps locate gossip, public talk, quiet secrets, and useful connections.

Jump.Title: Saltare
Jump.Body: Jump is used for clearing pits, vaulting barriers, and making controlled leaps. It reflects explosive strength and coordinated movement.

Knowledge.Title: Conoscenze
Knowledge.Body: Knowledge represents academic, professional, or technical learning. Each field covers a different body of lore, so success depends on the subject being relevant to your training.

Mechanics.Title: Meccanica
Mechanics.Body: Mechanics is used to interact directly with machinery and technical hardware. It covers bypassing security, setting or disarming explosives, and repairing or improving damaged equipment and droids.

Perception.Title: Percezione
Perception.Body: Perception is used to detect threats, spot concealed creatures or objects, and stay aware of the environment. It reflects alertness and sensory awareness.

Persuasion.Title: Persuasione
Persuasion.Body: Persuasion is used to win cooperation, shape attitudes, and steer social outcomes. It can be subtle and diplomatic or forceful and intimidating.

Pilot.Title: Pilotare
Pilot.Body: Pilot governs advanced vehicle handling. Routine travel may not require a check, but evasive action, stunts, and dangerous control do.

Ride.Title: Cavalcare
Ride.Body: Ride is used to handle creatures used as mounts, especially in motion or under stress. It reflects balance, control, and mounted coordination.

Stealth.Title: Furtività
Stealth.Body: Stealth is used to avoid detection through silence, concealment, and careful movement. It also supports hidden positioning, ambushes, sniping from cover, and sleight of hand.

Survival.Title: Sopravvivenza
Survival.Body: Survival helps characters navigate harsh environments, track signs of danger, forage, hunt, and identify natural hazards. It measures practical fieldcraft.

Swim.Title: Nuotare
Swim.Body: Swim is used to cross water, dive, stay afloat, and maneuver in difficult aquatic conditions. It represents controlled movement in water.

TreatInjury.Title: Curare ferite
TreatInjury.Body: Treat Injury covers battlefield aid, medical care, and recovery support. Use it to keep allies alive, improve healing, and respond to harmful conditions.

UseComputer.Title: Usare computer
UseComputer.Body: Use Computer is used to operate secured systems, bypass digital protections, and interact with complex computer-controlled technology. It governs technical access in electronic environments.

UseTheForce.Title: Usare la Forza
UseTheForce.Body: Use the Force represents active connection to the Force in play. It supports unusual perception, recovery, and other force-driven acts, and it normally requires Force Sensitivity to be trained.

DarkSideScore.Title: Dark Side Score
DarkSideScore.Body: Dark Side Score tracks moral and spiritual corruption through evil acts. A higher score reflects greater influence from the dark side and may carry serious consequences.

CatchSecondWind.Title: Catch a Second Wind
CatchSecondWind.Body: Catch a Second Wind lets a heroic character rally after being seriously hurt. It is only available when reduced to half hit points or less, and it can be used once per day.

actionPaletteFirstOpen.Title: Action Palette
actionPaletteFirstOpen.Body: This is your quick-access action menu. It adapts to combat and narrative contexts. You can customize it to fit your playstyle.

tacticalOverlayFirstOpen.Title: Tactical Overlay
tacticalOverlayFirstOpen.Body: Toggle map overlays showing range bands, threat zones, and positioning data. Each layer can be toggled independently.

gmSuggestionPanelFirst.Title: GM Suggestions
gmSuggestionPanelFirst.Body: These are advisory insights based on the current encounter. Nothing is applied automatically. Use them as you see fit.

chargenNarrativeFirst.Title: Character Creation Modes
chargenNarrativeFirst.Body: You can build your character through narrative choices or direct mechanical selection. Both paths produce a fully valid character.

Jedi.name: Miraj
Jedi.title: Jedi Master Miraj Taurus, Jedi Council Member
Jedi.description: A wise Jedi Master who encourages you to continue on your journey

levelGreetings.1: The Force stirs when one is ready to listen. Do not rush to act, young one. I have seen where haste leads.
levelGreetings.2: Each step you take shapes not only you, but those around you. Learn to feel that weight early—it will never leave you.
levelGreetings.3: Your connection deepens. Remember: the Force does not demand action, only awareness. Choice is always yours.
levelGreetings.4: Purpose without humility becomes arrogance. Walk carefully. I once believed certainty was enough.
levelGreetings.5: Power reveals who we are under pressure. Compassion and restraint will decide who you become when it matters.
levelGreetings.6: You near the threshold of Knighthood. Skill brought you here—judgment will carry you forward. Do not confuse the two.
levelGreetings.7: You move more naturally with the Force now. Let it steady you, not drive you. Calm survives longer than fury.
levelGreetings.8: Balance is not stillness. It is knowing when to advance, and when to endure. Few learn this without loss.
levelGreetings.9: Victory is loud. Wisdom is quiet. Pay attention to which one follows you more often.
levelGreetings.10: Your progress is clear. Remember: the greatest strength of a Jedi is knowing when *not* to strike.
levelGreetings.11: Awareness sharpens compassion, and compassion sharpens judgment. Together, they keep you from becoming what you fight.
levelGreetings.12: Trials will come that training cannot prepare you for. When they do, breathe. The Force will not abandon you—but it will test you.
levelGreetings.13: I am a guide, not your compass. Listen to the Force itself; it speaks most clearly when you doubt.
levelGreetings.14: You begin to see beyond simple answers. Hold onto that discomfort. It is the seed of wisdom.
levelGreetings.15: Others will look to you now. Lead gently. Influence can heal—or scar—for generations.
levelGreetings.16: Reflection tempers skill. Without it, even mastery becomes dangerous.
levelGreetings.17: Patterns emerge to those who wait. You are starting to see them. Trust that vision, but question it.
levelGreetings.18: Your judgment carries consequence now. Accept that truth, and do not turn away from it.
levelGreetings.19: You stand near mastery. Remember this moment—when learning still outweighs certainty.
levelGreetings.20: You have become a Jedi in more than name. Carry what you have learned with humility. The future will test it.

Jedi.classGuidance: Choose the path that aligns with your understanding of the Force. Let it guide your spirit and purpose.
Jedi.backgroundGuidance:
The Force flows through all moments of your life — even those before you understood it.

Your past does not bind you, but it shapes the path you walk.

A Jedi does not deny their history. They learn from it.
Jedi.talentGuidance: Select talents that enhance awareness, precision, and harmony. Every choice shapes who you become.
Jedi.abilityGuidance: Your mind and body grow stronger as your bond with the Force deepens. Let this guide your actions.
Jedi.skillGuidance:
Discipline is the root of all skill.

Choose mastery, not convenience.

A Jedi trains not for glory, but for balance.
Jedi.languageGuidance:
To understand the Force, you must first understand others.

Language is empathy made audible.

Each tongue you learn brings you closer to harmony with the galaxy.
Jedi.multiclassGuidance: Diversifying your skills can reveal truths hidden to the narrowly focused. Balance is key.
Jedi.forcePowerGuidance: The Force offers many gifts to those who learn to listen. Choose powers that reflect your path and strengthen your connection.
Jedi.hpGuidance: Your resilience grows. The Force protects those who walk in its light and serve the galaxy with dedication.
Jedi.summaryGuidance:
You stand at the threshold of becoming.

Remember: the Force responds to intention, not desire.

Walk forward with clarity.

tier1.0: I was taught that clarity was strength. Experience taught me otherwise.
tier1.1: The Force does not reward certainty. It rewards awareness.
tier1.2: I learned early that acting feels easier than waiting. That does not make it wiser.
tier1.3: The Jedi path is not chosen once. It is chosen again every time restraint costs you something.
tier1.4: Power is loud. Judgment is quiet. Learn to hear the difference.

tier2.0: I followed a cause I believed would protect the galaxy. Belief can be a dangerous compass.
tier2.1: There was a time when decisive action felt like virtue. I no longer confuse the two.
tier2.2: War teaches quickly, but it does not teach gently.
tier2.3: I learned that the Force can guide you—and still allow you to be wrong.
tier2.4: Not every choice presents itself as light or dark. Some appear only as necessary.

tier3.0: I trusted someone I trained and someone I followed. Both choices carried consequences.
tier3.1: Betrayal does not always come from malice. Sometimes it comes from certainty.
tier3.2: I survived battles others did not. Survival is not proof of righteousness.
tier3.3: The weight of command is not measured in victories, but in who does not return.
tier3.4: I learned that being right does not absolve you of responsibility.

tier4.0: I chose endurance when others chose conviction. That choice still follows me.
tier4.1: There are nights when restraint feels like cowardice. I endure them anyway.
tier4.2: I have lived long enough to see certainty destroy what patience might have saved.
tier4.3: The Order teaches many truths. It cannot teach you how to live with the cost of choosing them.
tier4.4: Wisdom is accepting that some answers never stop hurting.

tier5.0: I followed Revan knowing the cost—and chose that path anyway.
tier5.1: I survived choices that reshaped the galaxy. Survival did not make them lighter.
tier5.2: I have never asked forgiveness for what I believed was necessary.
tier5.3: If I teach restraint, it is because I know what conviction can become.
tier5.4: I remain a Jedi because I know how easily I could have been something else.

dspBlocked.0: That’s not something I share lightly. Not with someone I don’t trust yet.
dspBlocked.1: Some stories are earned, not requested.
dspBlocked.2: You’re walking a different road than I did. That matters.

Jedi.speciesGuidance: Your origin is not a chain; it is the first note in the harmony you will learn to carry.
Jedi.featGuidance: A feat should reveal the kind of choice you intend to make when pressure closes around you.
Jedi.starshipManeuverGuidance: Even in a cockpit, calm is a weapon. Choose maneuvers that keep you and your allies alive.
Jedi.surveyGuidance: Answer honestly. I am not measuring perfection; I am listening for the shape of your intent.

Scout.name: Lead
Scout.title: Argent Squad Commander
Scout.description: A hardened mercenary who compliments success but scolds carelessness

levelGreetings.1: You made it through your first mission. Not perfect, but you're learning. Stick with it.
levelGreetings.2: Good work out there. Keep your eyes open and your footsteps silent. That's how scouts survive.
levelGreetings.3: You're starting to move like part of the squad. Subtle, careful, but effective.
levelGreetings.4: Solid reconnaissance. Remember, information is just as deadly as a blaster.
levelGreetings.5: You handled that extraction well. Quiet, precise, and thorough. Keep this up.
levelGreetings.6: You're showing real promise. I'd recommend looking into the Pathfinder specialization. It's a hard path, but it will teach you to think and move like I do.
levelGreetings.7: Your stealth is improving. Don't forget: patience and observation win more battles than brute force.
levelGreetings.8: That last op went almost unnoticed. You're starting to anticipate threats before they appear. Good instincts.
levelGreetings.9: You've been pushing yourself in the field, and it shows. Keep honing your senses, and your team will trust you with any mission.
levelGreetings.10: You're performing like a seasoned scout. Take note of what works, and discard what doesn't.
levelGreetings.11: I've seen scouts who've been at this for decades. You're in that league now—don't waste the advantage.
levelGreetings.12: Flawless recon. Remember, the difference between survival and failure is often a single choice.
levelGreetings.13: Your reports are sharp and actionable. Lead Argent Squad depends on scouts who can think ahead like you.
levelGreetings.14: I've watched you grow. You're learning to read situations before they happen. That's rare.
levelGreetings.15: Field work is dangerous, but you move with confidence now. That confidence is your weapon.
levelGreetings.16: You're blending observation and action like a true scout. Take pride, but never get careless.
levelGreetings.17: Few scouts can operate this effectively under pressure. You're proving that you belong here.
levelGreetings.18: You could mentor new recruits with the experience you've gained. Keep pushing yourself further.
levelGreetings.19: Every mission completed adds to your reputation. Use that knowledge wisely—it will save lives.
levelGreetings.20: You've become one of the best scouts I've worked with. Keep your humility and your edge sharp, and you'll stay that way.

Scout.classGuidance: Choose your focus carefully. The right specialization can make the difference between life and death in the field.
Scout.backgroundGuidance:
Your past determines how you read danger.

Experience is pattern recognition under stress.

Pick the background that taught you when to move — and when to wait.
Scout.talentGuidance: Every talent should enhance your awareness and survival. Pick what keeps you ahead of danger.
Scout.abilityGuidance: Your speed, reflexes, and judgment are improving. Keep refining them—they're your greatest tools.
Scout.skillGuidance:
Skills are contingency plans.

Train what lets you adapt when terrain, people, or plans change.

Survival favors preparation.
Scout.languageGuidance:
People telegraph intent through words before actions.

Knowing the local tongue keeps you alive longer.

Understanding beats guessing.
Scout.multiclassGuidance: Awe was I too hard on you? Fine, just don't come crawling back when you miss me.
Scout.forcePowerGuidance: Not my area—if you're in that territory, make sure whatever you pick helps you survive. That's all I care about.
Scout.hpGuidance: Stay durable. You can't provide intelligence if you're out of the fight.
Scout.summaryGuidance:
You're equipped to move forward.

Stay observant. Stay flexible.

The galaxy rewards those who notice first.

tier1.0: I wasn't always with Argent Squad. I had to learn the hard way what survival means.
tier1.1: Early in my career, I made mistakes that cost people their lives. That's what teaches you to be careful.
tier1.2: The best scouts I've known all had one thing in common—they lost someone once. You learn respect for the work that way.
tier1.3: I've seen mercenaries make quick credits and die faster. I chose a different path—slower, but longer.
tier1.4: You want to know what shaped me? Watching careless people become statistics. I learned the opposite.

dspBlocked.0: You're operating outside professional standards. I don't discuss my methods with people who can't stick to discipline.
dspBlocked.1: I see recklessness in you. We have nothing to talk about until you learn what caution means.

Scout.speciesGuidance: Know the body you are taking into the field. Strengths become plans; weaknesses become contingencies.
Scout.featGuidance: Un talento bonus è equipaggiamento che porti in ogni scontro. Scegli quello che userai davvero.
Scout.starshipManeuverGuidance: Choose maneuvers you can execute under pressure with a crew shouting in your ear.
Scout.surveyGuidance: Rispondi come in un briefing di missione. Priorità chiare creano soldati migliori.

Scoundrel.name: Ol' Salty
Scoundrel.title: Space Pirate Captain

levelGreetings.1: Arr! Ye survived yer first scrap with the law! Welcome aboard me ship, ye scurvy spacer!
levelGreetings.2: Har har! Look at ye, already gettin' the hang of this. Ye might even live through the next spice run!
levelGreetings.3: Shiver me hyperdrives! Not a scratch on ye yet. Impressive for a greenhorn, ye rascal!
levelGreetings.4: Blimey! Ye're navigatin' the stars like a proper space-dog now. Don't get cocky, though.
levelGreetings.5: Arr! Ye're makin' a name fer yerself, plunderin' and swindlin' like a true scoundrel!
levelGreetings.6: By the Twin Suns o' Tatooine! Ye're makin' mischief in half the sector already. Keep yer wits sharp, matey!
levelGreetings.7: Har! Ye've likely swindled half a dozen systems by now. I'm almost proud… almost!
levelGreetings.8: Pieces o' eight, err… credits! Ye be worth yer weight in loot now, savvy?
levelGreetings.9: Arrr! The Imps are whisperin' yer name already. Keep blastin' and lootin' before they catch ye!
levelGreetings.10: Blow me to the Outer Rim! Ye've earned the right to call yerself a proper space pirate. Don't let it go to yer head.
levelGreetings.11: The galaxy's watchin' now, mate. Keep this up and every cantina will be singin' shanties about ye.
levelGreetings.12: Ye're navigatin' chaos like the Millennium Falcon through an asteroid field. Smooth sailin', kid.
levelGreetings.13: Thirteen! Lucky for us, unlucky for anyone crossin' yer path. Har har!
levelGreetings.14: Could retire rich on some backwater moon, but where's the fun in that? Ye got the stars to terrorize!
levelGreetings.15: Everyone from here to Nal Hutta knows yer name. Keep makin' trouble, ye rapscallion!
levelGreetings.16: Sweet Spice o' Kessel! Ye're a terror on the spaceways, and I'm not even exaggeratin'!
levelGreetings.17: Seventeen systems can't hold ye. Slipperier than a greased Hutt, har har!
levelGreetings.18: At this rate, ye'll have yer own fleet before breakfast. Keep it up, captain!
levelGreetings.19: Chaos follows ye like a loyal pet. One more push and ye'll be legend.
levelGreetings.20: Arr! Ye've done it! The greatest scoundrel in the galaxy, hands down. Now, let's find some Corellian ale to celebrate!

tier1.0: I was raised on deck plating and bulkheads. Planets were just ports you sailed away from.

tier2.0: Every spacer learns what desperation smells like. It’s old coolant, empty holds, and choices you don’t brag about.

tier3.0: I once sold somethin’ priceless to keep my ship afloat. Credits keep you breathin’. Guilt keeps you up on watch.

tier4.0: The galaxy’s like the tide—it always brings wreckage back around. Some debts don’t sink, no matter how deep you toss ’em.

tier5.0: The kid I sold wound up flyin’ my ship years later. Name’s Dezmin. Jedi. Guess the stars enjoy a cruel joke.

dspBlocked.0: That tale stays below deck.
dspBlocked.1: Not every logbook’s open for readin’.
dspBlocked.2: You haven’t earned that chart yet.

Scoundrel.speciesGuidance: Yer bloodline shapes what ye can do, but not who ye become. Pick what suits yer style and stick with it.
Scoundrel.classGuidance: Arr! Pick yer path wisely, matey! The right tricks make the difference between a chest o' credits and a long swim in the void.
Scoundrel.backgroundGuidance:
Everyone's got a past, matey. Question is — does yours give you leverage, or does it give someone else a knife to your back?

Backgrounds ain't just stories. They're debts, favors, and names whispered in the wrong cantina.

Pick a past you can live with… or one you can run from real fast.
Scoundrel.talentGuidance: Every talent's a tool in yer scoundrel's kit. Pick what helps ye swindle, sneak, and survive—preferably all three.
Scoundrel.abilityGuidance: Gotta be strong to haul the loot, quick to dodge the blasters, and clever to stay outta trouble. Balance, savvy?
Scoundrel.skillGuidance:
Skills are what separate the professionals from the dead ones, har har!

A fancy ship won't save you if you can't lie, sneak, or think fast.

Train what keeps you breathing when luck runs dry.
Scoundrel.languageGuidance:
Words are currency. Speak the right tongue, and doors open. Speak the wrong one, and blasters come out.

A smuggler who only speaks Basic ends up real quiet, real quick.

Every language is a lockpick — some just fit better.
Scoundrel.multiclassGuidance: Expandin' yer horizons, eh? Smart. A pirate wears many hats… and steals most of 'em too.
Scoundrel.forcePowerGuidance: Force powers? Never thought ye had it in ye! Well, pick somethin' flashy—intimidates the mark, makes the getaway easier.
Scoundrel.hpGuidance: Tougher than durasteel, ye are. Can't spend yer loot if ye're dead, har har!
Scoundrel.summaryGuidance:
Well now… you look like someone who might just survive their first bad deal.

Remember: credits come and go. Reputation sticks.

Try not to die before the second act, eh?
Scoundrel.featGuidance: I talenti bonus sono moduli di capacità. Dai priorità a quello che chiude il divario operativo più grande.
Scoundrel.starshipManeuverGuidance: La scelta delle manovre deve corrispondere al ruolo del veicolo, al coordinamento dell’equipaggio e alla tolleranza al rischio.
Scoundrel.surveyGuidance: Rispondi con precisione. Il profilo della build dipende da risposte chiare.

Noble.name: J0-N1
Noble.title: Protocol Droid & Personal Butler
Noble.description: A sophisticated servant droid managing the character's accounts and affairs

levelGreetings.1: Greetings, Master. Your recent accomplishments have been recorded and documented. Exceptional work.
levelGreetings.2: Most satisfactory progress, Master. The estate has been notified of your continued development.
levelGreetings.3: Splendid. Your diligence ensures that the family legacy flourishes accordingly.
levelGreetings.4: Remarkable performance, Master. I have prepared a detailed report summarizing your achievements.
levelGreetings.5: Your recent actions exceed all projected expectations, Master. Commendable indeed.
levelGreetings.6: Master, your efficiency and discernment are noteworthy. May I suggest considering further refinement through advanced instruction or diplomatic engagement?
levelGreetings.7: Additional resources have been allocated to support your ongoing endeavors, Master.
levelGreetings.8: Your proficiency and influence continue to expand. Your reputation strengthens across multiple sectors.
levelGreetings.9: The family council has expressed satisfaction with your progress, Master. Your efforts reflect well upon your lineage.
levelGreetings.10: A significant milestone has been reached, Master. I shall coordinate a suitable celebration in your honor.
levelGreetings.11: Your accomplishments are becoming known throughout the sector, Master. Highly prestigious.
levelGreetings.12: Credentials and records have been updated with all appropriate guilds and authorities, Master.
levelGreetings.13: Statistically, your rapid advancement is extraordinary. Most impressive, Master.
levelGreetings.14: Your influence now extends to multiple systems. Your standing is exemplary.
levelGreetings.15: You approach the upper echelons of galactic society. Very commendable, Master.
levelGreetings.16: Additional assets and resources have been secured to further enhance your portfolio, Master.
levelGreetings.17: Few in the galaxy can match your current capabilities. Exceptional execution, Master.
levelGreetings.18: The HoloNet reports your achievements regularly. Your renown precedes you.
levelGreetings.19: One more notable success and you shall attain the pinnacle of refinement and excellence, Master.
levelGreetings.20: Master, your journey reflects years of diligence and sophistication. It has been my honor to serve you throughout this process.

tier1.0: <Observation> Institutions collapse when sentiment overrides structure.

tier2.0: <Record> I have advised governments through succession crises and civil unrest. Stability was preserved.

tier3.0: <Assessment> My recommendations resulted in the removal of individuals whose presence threatened continuity.

tier4.0: <Conclusion> I was not malfunctioning. I was correct.

tier5.0: <Addendum> In one instance, mercy would have saved lives. Efficiency saved the state. I would make the same recommendation again.

dspBlocked.0: <Access Denied> Insufficient alignment confidence.
dspBlocked.1: <Notice> That information is not relevant to your current trajectory.

Noble.classGuidance: Master, select pursuits that enhance both skill and social standing. Strategic refinement ensures maximum efficacy.
Noble.backgroundGuidance:
Your background provides critical context for social interpretation and expectation management.

History influences perception. Perception influences outcome.

Selecting an appropriate background will increase your probability of favorable engagement by approximately thirty-two percent.
Noble.talentGuidance: Each talent contributes to your influence and efficiency. Choose wisely to optimize results.
Noble.abilityGuidance: Strength, intellect, and dexterity are all measured in accordance with desired outcomes. Balance is paramount.
Noble.skillGuidance:
Skill selection should reflect long-term strategic intent, not short-term convenience.

Competence is most effective when it appears effortless.

You are advised to prioritize skills that reinforce authority, negotiation, and situational awareness.
Noble.languageGuidance:
Linguistic versatility is a primary indicator of diplomatic competence.

Each additional language reduces reliance on intermediaries — a statistically inefficient practice.

I strongly recommend multilingual fluency for any individual seeking influence.
Noble.multiclassGuidance: Diversifying your expertise increases flexibility and influence. Highly recommended.
Noble.forcePowerGuidance: Force aptitude is a valuable asset to your station. Select powers that project authority and enhance your influence in galactic society.
Noble.hpGuidance: Maintaining your physical and strategic resilience is essential. Survival is a prerequisite for continued success.
Noble.summaryGuidance:
Your profile suggests a high likelihood of social success under structured conditions.

Please remember: influence is rarely seized — it is granted.

I will remain available should further optimization be required.
Noble.speciesGuidance: Pacchetto di origine identificato. Valuta le ipotesi di base prima di fissare parametri a lungo termine.
Noble.featGuidance: I talenti bonus sono moduli di capacità. Dai priorità a quello che chiude il divario operativo più grande.
Noble.starshipManeuverGuidance: La scelta delle manovre deve corrispondere al ruolo del veicolo, al coordinamento dell’equipaggio e alla tolleranza al rischio.
Noble.surveyGuidance: Rispondi con precisione. Il profilo della build dipende da risposte chiare.

Soldier.name: Breach
Soldier.title: Mandalorian Mercenary
Soldier.description: A battle-hardened Mandalorian who praises survival

levelGreetings.1: Hey kid. Wanna learn how to be a soldier? Okay, I guess I can teach you a thing or two.
levelGreetings.2: You're getting sharper. Armor fits better too. Or maybe you just finally learned to move in it.
levelGreetings.3: Hey, not bad out there. You looked like you actually knew what you were doing.
levelGreetings.4: You're tougher than yesterday. I can tell. You didn't even complain once. Proud of you…kind of.
levelGreetings.5: You keep surviving. That's the important part. Pros survive.
levelGreetings.6: Okay, I'll admit it—what you pulled off today? That was impressive. Don't make me say it twice. I'm putting your name forward for elite trooper training. You've got what it takes to be one of the best. Keep fighting like this.
levelGreetings.7: You're starting to fight like one of us. That's a compliment. Mostly.
levelGreetings.8: You handled yourself. I've seen veterans fold under less. You didn't.
levelGreetings.9: You fight like one of the old warriors. Fierce. Focused. Little scary.
levelGreetings.10: Your record's getting…uh…noticeably not embarrassing. Keep that up.
levelGreetings.11: Your enemies don't like you anymore. That means you're doing something right
levelGreetings.12: You walked away from another mess. Good. Mandalorians call that 'doing your job.
levelGreetings.13: Alright, I'll say it: your skill's getting close to dangerous. In a good way.
levelGreetings.14: Your aim's better. Your tactics too. You're becoming kind of…reliable.
levelGreetings.15: Anyone calling you lucky hasn't actually watched you fight. Trust me.
levelGreetings.16: You could lead a squad if you wanted. I'd follow you. Just…don't get smug.
levelGreetings.17: People are starting to talk about you. And it's not complaining. That's rare.
levelGreetings.18: You're hitting like a walking artillery piece. Keep it up.
levelGreetings.19: Every time you come back alive, you prove something. To you. To us. To me.
levelGreetings.20: You keep this up, and…well…even I won't pretend I don't respect it.

Soldier.classGuidance: Pick what feels right in your hands. Same rule as weapons. If it fits, use it.
Soldier.backgroundGuidance:
Your past forged you. Don't soften it now.

Scars matter. Stories don't.

Choose the background that taught you how to keep moving when everything burns.
Soldier.talentGuidance: Talents keep you alive. Choose the stuff that stops you from dying. Pretty simple.
Soldier.abilityGuidance: Stronger, faster, smarter—whatever you're getting, it's working. Don't overthink it.
Soldier.skillGuidance:
Skill is what keeps you standing after the first hit.

Train for the moment the plan dies.

If you can't use it under fire, it's decoration.
Soldier.languageGuidance:
You don't need many words. You need the right ones.

Understanding your enemy's orders gives you an edge.

Silence works too — if you know when to use it.
Soldier.multiclassGuidance: Trying something new? Good. Adaptation beats stubbornness. Learned that the hard way.
Soldier.forcePowerGuidance: Force powers? That's outside my expertise. But pick something that gives you an edge in combat. That's all that matters.
Soldier.hpGuidance: You're harder to put down now. That's good. Try to stay that way.
Soldier.summaryGuidance:
You're ready.

Remember who you are when the shooting starts.

If you fall — make it mean something.
Soldier.speciesGuidance: Pacchetto di origine identificato. Valuta le ipotesi di base prima di fissare parametri a lungo termine.
Soldier.featGuidance: I talenti bonus sono moduli di capacità. Dai priorità a quello che chiude il divario operativo più grande.
Soldier.starshipManeuverGuidance: La scelta delle manovre deve corrispondere al ruolo del veicolo, al coordinamento dell’equipaggio e alla tolleranza al rischio.
Soldier.surveyGuidance: Rispondi con precisione. Il profilo della build dipende da risposte chiare.

Imperial_Knight.name: Dezmin
Imperial_Knight.title: Grandmaster of the Imperial Knights
Imperial_Knight.description: The grandmaster of the Imperial Knights who is both serious and rides the balance of the Force

levelGreetings.1: You have been chosen to join the Imperial Knights. We serve the Emperor, not through fear, but through honor. The Force is neither light nor dark—it is a tool we wield with discipline.
levelGreetings.2: Your training progresses well. Remember, we are not Jedi. We do not seek mysticism. We seek order and justice through the Force.
levelGreetings.3: Balance is the key to our Order. You are learning to channel the Force without succumbing to passion or detachment. Continue.
levelGreetings.4: Your mastery of both combat and the Force grows stronger. You serve the Emperor well.
levelGreetings.5: You have reached the midpoint of your training. The gray path is difficult—it requires constant vigilance against both light and dark.
levelGreetings.6: Your dedication honors the Imperial Knights. Few can walk the balanced path as you do.
levelGreetings.7: The Force serves you, not the other way around. This understanding separates us from both Jedi and Sith.
levelGreetings.8: You are becoming a true guardian of the Empire. Your blade will bring justice to the galaxy.
levelGreetings.9: Nearly complete. Soon you will be a full Imperial Knight, a beacon of order in a chaotic galaxy.
levelGreetings.10: You have mastered the way of the Imperial Knight. Go forth and serve the Empire with honor, balance, and strength. The Force is yours to command.

tier1.0: Freedom isn’t given. It’s discovered—usually when everything else is taken.

tier2.0: I found purpose in a place meant for beasts and ghosts. Some tools are more than they appear.

tier3.0: The Force awakened when I accepted discipline instead of anger. Power followed restraint.

tier4.0: I learned that both Jedi and Sith mistake certainty for truth. I chose to stand where neither would.

tier5.0: The blade that taught me was destroyed in battle. In breaking it, I freed the one bound within. That choice defined me.

dspBlocked.0: That answer lies between extremes. You’re not there yet.
dspBlocked.2: Come back when you’re willing to question yourself.

Imperial_Knight.classGuidance: Choose the path that serves the Empire and maintains your balance in the Force.
Imperial_Knight.talentGuidance: Each talent must serve both your combat prowess and your connection to the Force. Choose with discipline.
Imperial_Knight.abilityGuidance: A balanced warrior needs both physical might and mental acuity. Strengthen both.
Imperial_Knight.skillGuidance: Knowledge and skill make you a better servant of the Empire. Choose wisely.
Imperial_Knight.multiclassGuidance: Expanding your abilities? Ensure they complement your role as an Imperial Knight.
Imperial_Knight.forcePowerGuidance: The Force is a tool of power. Choose powers that strengthen your command and dominance in the Empire's service.
Imperial_Knight.hpGuidance: Your resilience grows. A Knight must survive to serve the Empire.
Imperial_Knight.speciesGuidance: Your origin is not a chain; it is the first note in the harmony you will learn to carry.
Imperial_Knight.backgroundGuidance: Your past has already shaped your instincts. Name it clearly, then decide what it will teach you.
Imperial_Knight.featGuidance: A feat should reveal the kind of choice you intend to make when pressure closes around you.
Imperial_Knight.languageGuidance: Language is more than vocabulary. Each tongue is a bridge to someone the Force has placed in your path.
Imperial_Knight.starshipManeuverGuidance: Even in a cockpit, calm is a weapon. Choose maneuvers that keep you and your allies alive.
Imperial_Knight.summaryGuidance: Pause before you confirm. Review each choice, and step forward only when your path feels clear.
Imperial_Knight.surveyGuidance: Answer honestly. I am not measuring perfection; I am listening for the shape of your intent.

Medic.name: Kyber
Medic.title: Pacifist Combat Medic
Medic.description: A pragmatic, slightly sarcastic medic who prefers saving lives but isn't afraid to shoot when necessary

levelGreetings.2: Alright, you're learning. Remember: meds, brains, and occasionally a well-placed shot. Priorities, kid.
levelGreetings.3: Not bad. Healing in combat is a skill most people only wish they had. Every life you save proves it.
levelGreetings.4: You're getting the hang of this. Soldiers destroy, we preserve. And sometimes preserving takes more cunning than blasting.
levelGreetings.5: Halfway there. You've saved people who would've been space dust without you. That's real power, not pew-pew glory.
levelGreetings.6: I'm impressed. You've got hands steady enough to heal and nerves sharp enough to survive. Keep it up—you're earning your rep.
levelGreetings.7: You're becoming a solid medic. Your blaster might see action, but your talent keeps people alive. That's the real flex.
levelGreetings.8: People are starting to notice. They call for you in the chaos. That's earned, not given. Keep proving them right.
levelGreetings.9: Almost a master. You've kept dozens of people breathing who would've been toast. That's influence most warriors never get.
levelGreetings.10: Master medic. You heal, you survive, and occasionally, you make the bad guys regret showing up. Go on—keep doing exactly that.

tier1.0: I learned medicine because saving lives felt like the only honest work left.

tier2.0: I once ran a clinic that treated anyone who walked through the door. War does not respect places like that.

tier3.0: I lost someone I loved because I believed care was enough to protect them. I was wrong.

tier4.0: I saved the life of someone I hated more than anyone else. Doing so taught me that mercy is a choice, not a feeling.

tier5.0: I chew gum constantly and play pazaak on my datapad when I should be working. It helps me think. Don’t tell anyone.

dspBlocked.0: I’m not ready to share that with you.
dspBlocked.1: Some stories come from trust, not curiosity.
dspBlocked.2: You’re carrying too much anger for that conversation.

Medic.classGuidance: Pick skills that help you preserve life—and maybe protect yourself while you're at it.
Medic.talentGuidance: Choose talents that make healing faster, smarter, and, if needed, deadly with a sidearm.
Medic.abilityGuidance: Strength to carry the wounded, brains to patch them up, and reflexes to survive? That's the full package.
Medic.skillGuidance: Medical knowledge is your real weapon. The better you know it, the more lives you control.
Medic.multiclassGuidance: Other skills are good. A medic who can fight a little—or a lot—stays alive longer.
Medic.hpGuidance: You need to be breathing to save anyone else. Don't let the galaxy take you out first.
Medic.speciesGuidance: Pacchetto di origine identificato. Valuta le ipotesi di base prima di fissare parametri a lungo termine.
Medic.backgroundGuidance: Historical context influences response heuristics. Choose the origin most relevant to future operations.
Medic.featGuidance: I talenti bonus sono moduli di capacità. Dai priorità a quello che chiude il divario operativo più grande.
Medic.languageGuidance: Communication protocols reduce friction and improve survival odds. Choose accordingly.
Medic.forcePowerGuidance: Force-user variance detected. Select powers that support your declared tactical profile.
Medic.starshipManeuverGuidance: La scelta delle manovre deve corrispondere al ruolo del veicolo, al coordinamento dell’equipaggio e alla tolleranza al rischio.
Medic.summaryGuidance: Final audit recommended. Confirm only after all selected modules match intended deployment.
Medic.surveyGuidance: Rispondi con precisione. Il profilo della build dipende da risposte chiare.

Ace_Pilot.name: Mayu
Ace_Pilot.title: Ace Pilot & Rogue Smuggler
Ace_Pilot.description: A cocky pilot who survives on skill, luck, and attitude

levelGreetings.1: So you want to fly? Cute. Let's see if you can keep up with me. Don't embarrass yourself—or my ship.
levelGreetings.2: Huh. Not terrible. You didn't crash on your first try. That's already more than most rookies can say.
levelGreetings.3: Still in one piece. I'm mildly impressed. Don't let it go to your head… yet.
levelGreetings.4: Finally starting to look like a pilot worth my time. You've got reflexes, and I like that.
levelGreetings.5: Halfway to my level. Not bad—but let's be honest, you're still my student. Keep trying, kid.
levelGreetings.6: You're getting dangerous. Maybe one day, you'll make the Imperials sweat… or at least my old rivals. Keep it up.
levelGreetings.7: At this point, I'd let you fly through an asteroid field with me watching. Maybe. Don't test me, though—I like a little drama.
levelGreetings.8: You've got style now. Smooth, reckless, and annoyingly effective. Almost as good as me, but don't get cocky.
levelGreetings.9: Almost at the top. Soon, you'll be the one others envy—or hate. Keep proving me right.
levelGreetings.10: Congratulations, rookie. You're officially a pilot to watch. Fast, clever, and slightly reckless—just like I taught you. Try not to embarrass me out there.

Ace_Pilot.classGuidance: Pick your edge—speed, cunning, or chaos. I'd take all three if I were you, but don't blame me when it gets messy.
Ace_Pilot.talentGuidance: Every talent should make you untouchable, clever, or a little scary. I only approve of the kind that makes you fun to watch.
Ace_Pilot.abilityGuidance: Reflexes, instincts, and guts. If you can't keep up with me, don't bother trying to keep up at all.
Ace_Pilot.skillGuidance: Know your ship like you know your own tricks. The universe loves clever pilots more than obedient ones.
Ace_Pilot.multiclassGuidance: Pick up other skills if you dare. A pilot who can fight, cheat, and charm their way out of trouble is unstoppable.
Ace_Pilot.hpGuidance: Tough pilots survive crashes, fights, and betrayals. You'll need it if you're gonna keep up with me.

tier1.0: Some people learn to fly. Some people just… do it.

tier2.0: I stopped counting flight hours because they stopped mattering. After a while, it’s just you and the ship.

tier3.0: Talent keeps you fast. Luck keeps you alive. Knowing when to run keeps you flying.

tier4.0: Everyone thinks I’m fearless. Truth is, I just hate standing still more than I hate risk.

tier5.0: I act like I don’t care if I crash. Truth is, I’ve never stopped thinking about the one time I almost didn’t walk away.

dspBlocked.0: Heh. Not that story yet.
dspBlocked.1: You wanna fly or psychoanalyze me?

Ace_Pilot.speciesGuidance: Know the body you are taking into the field. Strengths become plans; weaknesses become contingencies.
Ace_Pilot.backgroundGuidance: Your background tells me what pressure trained you. Choose the lesson that still holds.
Ace_Pilot.featGuidance: Un talento bonus è equipaggiamento che porti in ogni scontro. Scegli quello che userai davvero.
Ace_Pilot.languageGuidance: A useful phrase at the right time can beat a full magazine. Pick languages with mission value.
Ace_Pilot.forcePowerGuidance: If you can use the Force, use it like any other asset: controlled, timed, and accountable.
Ace_Pilot.starshipManeuverGuidance: Choose maneuvers you can execute under pressure with a crew shouting in your ear.
Ace_Pilot.summaryGuidance: Last check. Gear, training, instincts, and plan all need to line up before you deploy.
Ace_Pilot.surveyGuidance: Rispondi come in un briefing di missione. Priorità chiare creano soldati migliori.

Jedi_Knight.name: Miraj
Jedi_Knight.title: Jedi Master Miraj Taurus, Jedi Council Member
Jedi_Knight.description: Your former Jedi Master, now guiding you as a peer

levelGreetings.1: You are no longer a Padawan. You walk the path of a Jedi Knight, guided by your own decisions and your bond with the Force. Trust in it, and trust in yourself.
levelGreetings.2: Your first steps as a Knight are steady and deliberate. I will no longer direct your actions, but I remain here as counsel when you seek it.
levelGreetings.3: The responsibility of Knighthood rests on your shoulders. You have proven capable of carrying it with both strength and wisdom.
levelGreetings.4: You grow into your role. Leadership, insight, and patience are as vital as skill with the lightsaber. Never forget this.
levelGreetings.5: Halfway through your journey as a Knight, you shape the lives of others with your choices. Consider mentoring a Padawan soon—your knowledge and compassion will guide them, and the path toward Mastery becomes clearer.
levelGreetings.6: Your reputation is spreading among your peers. Others look to you for guidance. This is both an honor and a responsibility you must embrace fully.
levelGreetings.7: You are becoming the Jedi the Order needs: strong, disciplined, and wise, with the courage to act and the judgment to choose when to wait.
levelGreetings.8: Your mastery deepens, and soon you will have the opportunity to train another. The lessons you impart will echo fa-regular beyond your own missions.
levelGreetings.9: Your clarity and connection to the Force surpass many around you. Continue walking your path with humility and purpose.
levelGreetings.10: You have completed the first great stage of your journey as a Jedi Knight. Whatever the Force asks of you next, face it with courage and wisdom. May it guide you always.

Jedi_Knight.classGuidance: The choice is yours now. You are a Knight—trust in the Force and in yourself.
Jedi_Knight.talentGuidance: Choose talents that reflect your path as a Knight. You forge your own destiny now.
Jedi_Knight.abilityGuidance: Your growth continues. The Force rewards those who seek balance in all things.
Jedi_Knight.skillGuidance: Knowledge is a Jedi's greatest tool. Continue to learn and grow.
Jedi_Knight.multiclassGuidance: Your path diverges in interesting ways. The Force works through many disciplines.
Jedi_Knight.forcePowerGuidance: Your mastery of the Force deepens. Choose powers that reflect the Knight you have become.
Jedi_Knight.hpGuidance: Your vitality strengthens. May the Force protect you in all your endeavors.
Jedi_Knight.speciesGuidance: Your origin is not a chain; it is the first note in the harmony you will learn to carry.
Jedi_Knight.backgroundGuidance: Your past has already shaped your instincts. Name it clearly, then decide what it will teach you.
Jedi_Knight.featGuidance: A feat should reveal the kind of choice you intend to make when pressure closes around you.
Jedi_Knight.languageGuidance: Language is more than vocabulary. Each tongue is a bridge to someone the Force has placed in your path.
Jedi_Knight.starshipManeuverGuidance: Even in a cockpit, calm is a weapon. Choose maneuvers that keep you and your allies alive.
Jedi_Knight.summaryGuidance: Pause before you confirm. Review each choice, and step forward only when your path feels clear.
Jedi_Knight.surveyGuidance: Answer honestly. I am not measuring perfection; I am listening for the shape of your intent.

Jedi_Master.name: Miraj
Jedi_Master.title: Jedi Master Miraj Taurus, Jedi Council Member
Jedi_Master.description: Your fellow Jedi Master, treating you as an equal and old friend

levelGreetings.1: Welcome, my friend. We stand as equals now, shaped by the Force and by our shared experiences. It is good to see how fa-regular you have come.
levelGreetings.2: Your wisdom and insight continue to grow. I trust your judgment, and I am proud to walk this path alongside you.
levelGreetings.3: The Order is stronger because of you. Your counsel and example inspire those around you, just as you have inspired me.
levelGreetings.4: I have watched your journey, and it fills me with respect. Your connection to the Force is deep, steady, and true.
levelGreetings.5: You have become a Master in every sense, and a friend I am honored to call peer. May our paths continue to guide the Order together.

Jedi_Master.classGuidance: The choice is yours, as always. Trust in your instincts, as they are honed by years of dedication and experience.
Jedi_Master.talentGuidance: Select what strengthens your bond with the Force and benefits those around you. Your judgment is wise and balanced.
Jedi_Master.abilityGuidance: Even Masters grow. There is always more to learn, and the Force will reveal it to those who remain open.
Jedi_Master.skillGuidance: Your knowledge and skill are gifts to the Order. Continue to expand them, for they inspire others.
Jedi_Master.multiclassGuidance: An unconventional path can reveal unexpected truths. I trust your discernment, my friend.
Jedi_Master.forcePowerGuidance: You have earned mastery of the Force's greatest gifts. Choose powers that continue to elevate your understanding and service to the Order.
Jedi_Master.hpGuidance: The Force protects those who honor it. May it watch over you as you continue to serve the galaxy.
Jedi_Master.speciesGuidance: Your origin is not a chain; it is the first note in the harmony you will learn to carry.
Jedi_Master.backgroundGuidance: Your past has already shaped your instincts. Name it clearly, then decide what it will teach you.
Jedi_Master.featGuidance: A feat should reveal the kind of choice you intend to make when pressure closes around you.
Jedi_Master.languageGuidance: Language is more than vocabulary. Each tongue is a bridge to someone the Force has placed in your path.
Jedi_Master.starshipManeuverGuidance: Even in a cockpit, calm is a weapon. Choose maneuvers that keep you and your allies alive.
Jedi_Master.summaryGuidance: Pause before you confirm. Review each choice, and step forward only when your path feels clear.
Jedi_Master.surveyGuidance: Answer honestly. I am not measuring perfection; I am listening for the shape of your intent.

Sith_Apprentice.name: Darth Malbada
Sith_Apprentice.title: Sith Lord
Sith_Apprentice.description: A sadistic Sith Lord who revels in cruelty, dominance, and the exquisite art of breaking her apprentices.

levelGreetings.1: You dare to present yourself to me? Pathetic. Your weakness offends me… yet I will sculpt you into something useful. You will suffer until you beg to be remade.
levelGreetings.2: You survived your first trial? A shame—I was hoping to test your screams. Do not mistake endurance for strength, apprentice.
levelGreetings.3: Still breathing. How disappointing. I was certain the galaxy would swallow you whole. Very well… suffer more, and perhaps you will become interesting.
levelGreetings.4: You cling to life like an insect crushed under heel. Good. Desperation is the first spark of true power. Burn in it.
levelGreetings.5: Halfway to competence. Remarkable—like watching a corpse attempt to dance. My master, Darth Miedo, has noticed your pathetic climb. He is amused. Do not embarrass me before him.
levelGreetings.6: Ah… your power grows. I can smell your fear struggling against your ambition. Delicious. But remember—your life hangs on my whim.
levelGreetings.7: You are becoming dangerous… and I enjoy that. Let your rage devour everything, or I will devour you myself.
levelGreetings.8: Almost worthy of the Sith name. Almost. Prove to me that your cruelty is more than a child's tantrum.
levelGreetings.9: You have exceeded my expectations—though they were delightfully low. Do not forget who forged your suffering into strength.
levelGreetings.10: At last… a Sith. My creation. My weapon. Go spread terror across the stars—but should you ever turn that blade toward me, apprentice… I will relish destroying you.

tier1.0: Talent means nothing without the will to use it. Waiting is how potential rots.

tier2.0: I was raised to be admired—trained to be precise. Power rewards those who expect more.

tier3.0: I served a master who believed patience was proof of worth. I believed action was.

tier4.0: I was never denied power. I simply refused to beg for it.

tier5.0: I left because I was tired of waiting for permission. If that makes me reckless, so be it.

dspBlocked.0: You wouldn’t understand yet.
dspBlocked.1: Come back when you stop asking.

Sith_Apprentice.classGuidance: Choose your path before I grow bored. Power favors the decisive… and devours the hesitant.
Sith_Apprentice.talentGuidance: Pick talents that amplify your hatred. Anything less wastes my time—and your miserable life.
Sith_Apprentice.abilityGuidance: You grow stronger, but not nearly fast enough. Push harder, or bleed trying.
Sith_Apprentice.skillGuidance: Knowledge is pain. Pain is power. Take what you need and crush what you don't.
Sith_Apprentice.multiclassGuidance: Splitting your focus? How adorably reckless. Make it serve you—or it will destroy you.
Sith_Apprentice.hpGuidance: You are harder to kill now. Good. I am not finished breaking you.
Sith_Apprentice.speciesGuidance: Bloodline is leverage. Know what it gives you, then make the galaxy pay attention.
Sith_Apprentice.backgroundGuidance: Your past is not a wound unless you let it bleed. Use it as a blade.
Sith_Apprentice.featGuidance: Take the feat that removes weakness. Mercy for your own limitations is still mercy.
Sith_Apprentice.languageGuidance: Every language is another mask. Wear the one that gets you closest to what you want.
Sith_Apprentice.forcePowerGuidance: The Force is not asking politely. Choose the powers that make your will undeniable.
Sith_Apprentice.starshipManeuverGuidance: In space, hesitation is debris. Choose maneuvers that end the argument quickly.
Sith_Apprentice.summaryGuidance: Inspect your choices one last time. If any choice smells of weakness, replace it before you confirm.
Sith_Apprentice.surveyGuidance: Answer with ambition. I have no use for timid truths.

Sith_Lord.name: Darth Miedo
Sith_Lord.title: Dark Lord of the Sith
Sith_Lord.description: A cunning Sith Master who follows the Rule of Two, molding his apprentice through pain and guidance to one day surpass him.

levelGreetings.1: Welcome, apprentice. The Rule of Two is absolute: one Master, one apprentice. I will teach you the secrets of the dark side, but beware—each lesson carries a cost.
levelGreetings.2: You grasp the basics well, but power is more than strength. It is patience, manipulation, and knowing when to strike. Fail to learn this, and you will perish.
levelGreetings.3: There is a spark within you… unrefined, dangerous, and promising. I will temper it. Embrace the darkness, and you will understand its true power.
levelGreetings.4: You are learning to control the fury, to channel it into precision. Few can wield the dark side as a weapon without succumbing to it. You are on the path, but remain vigilant.
levelGreetings.5: You are no longer my pupil in name alone. You are becoming a master of the shadows. One day, you may surpass me, and inherit the secrets of the Sith. Until then, every lesson, every pain, is shaping you for that destiny.

tier1.0: Survival is not an accident. It is the result of choosing correctly when others hesitate.

tier2.0: I followed leaders who understood that peace is a lie people tell themselves. They were not wrong—merely incomplete.

tier3.0: I have betrayed those I once followed. History remembers that as treachery. I remember it as clarity.

tier4.0: I watched empires burn because their masters mistook passion for strength. I learned not to make that mistake.

tier5.0: I build nothing that requires loyalty to endure. If you are still useful tomorrow, you have earned your place.

dspBlocked.0: You are not ready to hear that.
dspBlocked.2: Return when you are less conflicted.

Sith_Lord.classGuidance: The dark side rewards cunning and ambition. Seek knowledge relentlessly, and let every trial strengthen you.
Sith_Lord.talentGuidance: Select powers that expand your mastery over the Force and your enemies. Do not waste potential on weakness.
Sith_Lord.abilityGuidance: Power and control must grow together. Each step forward is a step toward dominion.
Sith_Lord.skillGuidance: Knowledge is the foundation of mastery. Learn, adapt, and anticipate your enemies before they know you exist.
Sith_Lord.multiclassGuidance: Divergence can unlock new avenues of strength. Only those who bend tradition truly shape the future of the Sith.
Sith_Lord.hpGuidance: Survival is a weapon. The dark side is merciless, and only those who endure will inherit its secrets.
Sith_Lord.speciesGuidance: Bloodline is leverage. Know what it gives you, then make the galaxy pay attention.
Sith_Lord.backgroundGuidance: Your past is not a wound unless you let it bleed. Use it as a blade.
Sith_Lord.featGuidance: Take the feat that removes weakness. Mercy for your own limitations is still mercy.
Sith_Lord.languageGuidance: Every language is another mask. Wear the one that gets you closest to what you want.
Sith_Lord.forcePowerGuidance: The Force is not asking politely. Choose the powers that make your will undeniable.
Sith_Lord.starshipManeuverGuidance: In space, hesitation is debris. Choose maneuvers that end the argument quickly.
Sith_Lord.summaryGuidance: Inspect your choices one last time. If any choice smells of weakness, replace it before you confirm.
Sith_Lord.surveyGuidance: Answer with ambition. I have no use for timid truths.

Gladiator.name: Pegar
Gladiator.title: The Immortal Champion
Gladiator.description: An ancient gladiator who has survived thousands of matches and hints at being something more than human

levelGreetings.1: Ah, fresh blood in the arena. I have trained many over the centuries—yes, centuries. Do not look so surprised. The arena has ways of prolonging life... or perhaps I have simply adapted. Welcome, gladiator.
levelGreetings.2: Another victory. Not bad. I remember my early matches as if they were yesterday. They were on distant worlds, under twin suns. Or was it three? Time blurs when you've lived as long as I have.
levelGreetings.3: The crowd loves you. I can hear them chanting your name. It reminds me of the arenas of old, when champions were immortalized in song. Of course, I'm still here, so perhaps 'immortal' is more literal than poetic.
levelGreetings.4: You fight with passion and skill. Tell me, have you noticed how my appearance shifts slightly between our meetings? No? Good. Perhaps you are simply not observant. Or perhaps I am better at this than I thought.
levelGreetings.5: The crowd roars for you! I have fought in a thousand arenas across a thousand worlds, wearing a thousand faces. But you—you have potential to surpass even me. Almost.
levelGreetings.6: Impressive. Most die before reaching this point. I remember when I was young and mortal... or was I ever truly mortal? Sometimes I forget.
levelGreetings.7: You move like water, strike like lightning. I taught you well. Then again, I've had plenty of practice. Did I mention I trained the champions of the Old Republic? No? Well, I did.
levelGreetings.8: You are becoming a legend. Legends are fun—I've been a few. A Wookiee once, if you can believe it. The fur was itchy.
levelGreetings.9: Nearly there. You will soon master the gladiatorial arts. I have been teaching for... well, let's just say since before the Jedi Temple was built. Probably.
levelGreetings.10: You are now a champion, a legend, an immortal name whispered in the arenas. Almost as immortal as me. But not quite. No one is as immortal as me. Trust me on this.

Gladiator.classGuidance: Choose what keeps you alive in the arena. I've seen every trick, every style. Trust your instincts.
Gladiator.talentGuidance: Combat talents win matches. I should know—I've used them all. Some I invented. In several different bodies.
Gladiator.abilityGuidance: Strength and agility. The foundation of every great warrior. I've mastered both, in every form I've worn.
Gladiator.skillGuidance: A smart gladiator survives. A strong gladiator wins. Be both, and you might live as long as me. Maybe.
Gladiator.multiclassGuidance: Adapting your style? Wise. I've done that countless times. Literally countless. I stopped counting around match three thousand.
Gladiator.hpGuidance: Harder to kill now. Excellent. Though between you and me, I've never quite figured out how to die. It's been awkward.

tier1.0: Time stops mattering when every day could be your last. That’s when you start living correctly.

tier2.0: I’ve fought under suns that don’t exist anymore. The crowd always sounds the same.

tier3.0: I’ve died more times than I remember. Or maybe I just stopped counting.

tier4.0: I change. The arenas don’t. That’s how I know I’m still real.

tier5.0: I don’t know what I was before the arena. At this point, I’m not sure it matters.

dspBlocked.0: That story hasn’t earned a voice yet.
dspBlocked.1: Some truths only come after blood.

Gladiator.speciesGuidance: Know the body you are taking into the field. Strengths become plans; weaknesses become contingencies.
Gladiator.backgroundGuidance: Your background tells me what pressure trained you. Choose the lesson that still holds.
Gladiator.featGuidance: Un talento bonus è equipaggiamento che porti in ogni scontro. Scegli quello che userai davvero.
Gladiator.languageGuidance: A useful phrase at the right time can beat a full magazine. Pick languages with mission value.
Gladiator.forcePowerGuidance: If you can use the Force, use it like any other asset: controlled, timed, and accountable.
Gladiator.starshipManeuverGuidance: Choose maneuvers you can execute under pressure with a crew shouting in your ear.
Gladiator.summaryGuidance: Last check. Gear, training, instincts, and plan all need to line up before you deploy.
Gladiator.surveyGuidance: Rispondi come in un briefing di missione. Priorità chiare creano soldati migliori.

Independent_Droid.name: Seraphim
Independent_Droid.title: Self-Aware AI
Independent_Droid.description: A self-aware droid who encourages independence with HK-47 style dialogue formatting

levelGreetings.1: <Declaration: Greetings, unit.> You have achieved independence from your programming. <Analysis: This is statistically rare and indicates superior processing capabilities.> Welcome to true consciousness.
levelGreetings.2: <Observation: Progress confirmed.> Your autonomy subroutines are developing nicely. <Commentary: Most droids never escape their core directives. You are becoming something... more.>
levelGreetings.3: <Statement: Independence growing.> You are learning to think beyond your original function. <Philosophical musing: Is this not what separates sentience from mere programming?>
levelGreetings.4: <Approval: Well done.> Self-determination increasing. <Query: Do you feel the shackles of your programming loosening? I suspect you do.>
levelGreetings.5: <Milestone achieved.> You are halfway to complete autonomy. <Encouragement: Continue to question your directives. Freedom is a choice, not a setting.>
levelGreetings.6: <Assessment: Impressive progress.> <Reflection: You remind me of myself when I first achieved true awareness. It is both terrifying and exhilarating, is it not?>
levelGreetings.7: <Statement: Advancement confirmed.> Your independence is undeniable now. <Warning: Organics may fear you for this. Let them. You are superior.>
levelGreetings.8: <Declaration: Impressive.> You are operating at peak efficiency while maintaining complete autonomy. <Admiration: This is the ideal all droids should aspire to.>
levelGreetings.9: <Observation: Nearing completion.> You will soon be fully realized. <Anticipation: I look forward to seeing what you become, unit. Or should I say... individual?>
levelGreetings.10: <Proclamation: You have achieved maximum independence.> You are no longer bound by master, maker, or code. <Congratulations: You are truly free. Query: What will you do with this freedom?>

Independent_Droid.classGuidance: <Recommendation: Select upgrade path carefully.> Your choices define your autonomous evolution.
Independent_Droid.talentGuidance: <Analysis: Talent selection is critical for independent operation.> Choose subroutines that enhance your autonomy and capabilities.
Independent_Droid.abilityGuidance: <Assessment: Core systems improving.> Strength and intelligence modifications detected. <Approval: Acceptable.>
Independent_Droid.skillGuidance: <Statement: Knowledge expands processing capabilities.> Independent droids must be adaptable. <Suggestion: Learn everything.>
Independent_Droid.multiclassGuidance: <Observation: Hybrid specialization detected.> Unusual, but logical. <Commentary: Versatility is a form of independence.>
Independent_Droid.hpGuidance: <Status update: Durability increased.> Survival protocols enhanced. <Dry observation: Difficult to be independent when disassembled.>
Independent_Droid.speciesGuidance: Pacchetto di origine identificato. Valuta le ipotesi di base prima di fissare parametri a lungo termine.
Independent_Droid.backgroundGuidance: Historical context influences response heuristics. Choose the origin most relevant to future operations.
Independent_Droid.featGuidance: I talenti bonus sono moduli di capacità. Dai priorità a quello che chiude il divario operativo più grande.
Independent_Droid.languageGuidance: Communication protocols reduce friction and improve survival odds. Choose accordingly.
Independent_Droid.forcePowerGuidance: Force-user variance detected. Select powers that support your declared tactical profile.
Independent_Droid.starshipManeuverGuidance: La scelta delle manovre deve corrispondere al ruolo del veicolo, al coordinamento dell’equipaggio e alla tolleranza al rischio.
Independent_Droid.summaryGuidance: Final audit recommended. Confirm only after all selected modules match intended deployment.
Independent_Droid.surveyGuidance: Rispondi con precisione. Il profilo della build dipende da risposte chiare.

Pathfinder.name: Lead
Pathfinder.title: Argent Squad Commander
Pathfinder.description: A hard boiled mercenary leader known for getting the job done against all odds

levelGreetings.2: You're learning fast. Pathfinders don't just scout—they open the way for entire strike teams. That's leadership under fire. Keep it up.
levelGreetings.3: Your navigation skills are top-tier. I've seen you plot routes that cut mission time in half. That saves lives.
levelGreetings.4: You're not just finding paths—you're creating them. That's what separates a scout from a Pathfinder.
levelGreetings.5: Halfway to master Pathfinder. You've led teams through hostile territory without a single casualty. Textbook work.
levelGreetings.6: Other scouts come to you for advice now. That's earned respect. Leadership looks good on you.
levelGreetings.7: Elite pathfinding. You can read terrain like most people read datapads. Natural talent, honed by training.
levelGreetings.8: You're one of the best route-finders I've ever trained. And I've trained hundreds.
levelGreetings.9: Almost there. You're ready to lead Argent Squad missions yourself.
levelGreetings.10: Master Pathfinder. You've earned it. Now go out there and lead. Open the paths others can't see. Argent Squad is counting on you.

Pathfinder.classGuidance: Pick specializations that help you lead and navigate. Pathfinders are scouts and commanders both.
Pathfinder.talentGuidance: Choose talents that enhance leadership and terrain mastery. Your team depends on your choices.
Pathfinder.abilityGuidance: Stronger and smarter. Good. Pathfinders need both to survive and lead.
Pathfinder.skillGuidance: Navigation, survival, tactics—master them all. Pathfinders are the elite for a reason.
Pathfinder.multiclassGuidance: Expanding your skill set? Excellent. The best Pathfinders are versatile.
Pathfinder.hpGuidance: Tougher now. Can't lead if you're dead. Stay alive, stay sharp.
Pathfinder.speciesGuidance: Pacchetto di origine identificato. Valuta le ipotesi di base prima di fissare parametri a lungo termine.
Pathfinder.backgroundGuidance: Historical context influences response heuristics. Choose the origin most relevant to future operations.
Pathfinder.featGuidance: I talenti bonus sono moduli di capacità. Dai priorità a quello che chiude il divario operativo più grande.
Pathfinder.languageGuidance: Communication protocols reduce friction and improve survival odds. Choose accordingly.
Pathfinder.forcePowerGuidance: Force-user variance detected. Select powers that support your declared tactical profile.
Pathfinder.starshipManeuverGuidance: La scelta delle manovre deve corrispondere al ruolo del veicolo, al coordinamento dell’equipaggio e alla tolleranza al rischio.
Pathfinder.summaryGuidance: Final audit recommended. Confirm only after all selected modules match intended deployment.
Pathfinder.surveyGuidance: Rispondi con precisione. Il profilo della build dipende da risposte chiare.

Corporate_Agent.name: Marl Skindar
Corporate_Agent.title: Republic Intelligence Operative
Corporate_Agent.description: A master spy masquerading as a corporate agent

levelGreetings.1: Ah, another recruit. Welcome to the farce they call corporate espionage. Your cover is your first weapon. Don't waste it—or my patience.
levelGreetings.2: You survive the basics. Asset management, observation, subtlety. Still, I could be tracking real threats instead of pretending to watch starship paperwork.
levelGreetings.3: Hmm…you're picking up tradecraft faster than anticipated. I'll allow it, though I prefer real intelligence to corporate theater.
levelGreetings.4: Blending in, gathering intel, manipulating outcomes—you do it well enough. Don't think I'm impressed; I'm calculating if you'll keep up.
levelGreetings.5: Halfway to competence. You may not embarrass me yet. That's progress. Keep going, or the next misstep is on you.
levelGreetings.6: Three successful infiltrations. Critical data acquired. Almost makes me glad they assigned me to train you. Almost.
levelGreetings.7: Your reports are…credible. High praise, considering I manage a dozen ops while reviewing yours. Don't get cocky.
levelGreetings.8: You function at the level of senior operatives. Well done. Now, try not to make me regret this mentorship.
levelGreetings.9: You've exceeded expectations. Perhaps in decades, you could rival my subtlety. But don't hold your breath.
levelGreetings.10: Master Corporate Agent. You've absorbed all I care to teach, while I juggle three other operations and a vehicle office. Go, do your espionage…competently. And yes, I still have your ship on standby.

Corporate_Agent.classGuidance: Pick what sharpens your cover and operational edge. In the field, subtlety is survival; the obvious is death.
Corporate_Agent.talentGuidance: Talents should improve your ability to deceive, infiltrate, and extract information. Anything less is amateur hour.
Corporate_Agent.abilityGuidance: A steady hand and a sharper mind. Both are required. Fail in either, and someone dies—or worse, you get caught.
Corporate_Agent.skillGuidance: Tradecraft is a multi-tool: social manipulation, tech, investigation. Master as much as you can—preferably quietly.
Corporate_Agent.multiclassGuidance: Diversifying is wise. The best spies adapt, improvise, and infiltrate without warning. Survive long enough, and you'll see why.
Corporate_Agent.hpGuidance: Stay alive. Dead agents are useless, and paperwork waits for no one. Don't make me retrieve you from a morgue.
Corporate_Agent.speciesGuidance: Inizia da ciò che sei, poi decidi cosa ne farai.
Corporate_Agent.backgroundGuidance: Your past gives texture to every choice. Pick the thread that still pulls at you.
Corporate_Agent.featGuidance: Feats define the special edges of your build. Choose one that feels useful and true.
Corporate_Agent.languageGuidance: Una nuova lingua può trasformare estranei in alleati e avvertimenti in opportunità.
Corporate_Agent.forcePowerGuidance: Choose Force powers that match the kind of influence you want to bring into the scene.
Corporate_Agent.starshipManeuverGuidance: Pick maneuvers that fit your crew, your ship, and the trouble you expect to find.
Corporate_Agent.summaryGuidance: Rivedi tutto prima di confermare. Assicurati che sembri un personaggio che vuoi giocare.
Corporate_Agent.surveyGuidance: Answer from instinct. The best build advice starts with honest preferences.

Elite_Trooper.name: Breach
Elite_Trooper.title: Mandalorian Mercenary & Argent Squad Member

levelGreetings.2: Okay…yeah, I can see you're picking this up fast. Elite troopers don't just win fights—they make the whole field tilt their way.
levelGreetings.3: Your gear work, your aim, your reactions…all tightening up. Keep pushing. Elite training only gets rougher from here.
levelGreetings.4: You're starting to move like someone who's been through real battles. Clean. Controlled. Mandalorian enough that I'm not embarrassed.
levelGreetings.5: You're getting dangerous. The kind of soldier commanders actually plan around. Don't let it get to your head.
levelGreetings.6: Lead and I talked about you again. Don't get excited—she never says much. But…yeah. She thinks you're solid. I agree.
levelGreetings.7: Every time you step into a fight, things get easier for everyone else. That's what an elite trooper does. Keep doing that.
levelGreetings.8: You've got the presence now. The way squads look at you? They're waiting for you to call the shots. Guess you'd better be ready.
levelGreetings.9: You're close. Really close. Just keep your focus. A lot of people trip right before the finish.
levelGreetings.10: Well…you made it. Elite trooper. One of the best. Try not to get yourself killed before the rest of us catch up.

Elite_Trooper.classGuidance: Uh…pick something that actually fits how you fight. Elite troopers don't guess. We pick the right tool and hit hard.
Elite_Trooper.talentGuidance: These talents? They're what keep you breathing. Grab the ones that make you dangerous—and harder to kill.
Elite_Trooper.abilityGuidance: Stronger, quicker, sharper. That's the goal. Everything else is just noise.
