Analysis.LevelArchetype:
At level {level}, the galaxy sees you becoming a **{name}**.

{description}
Analysis.ChartingOwnPath: At level {level}, you are charting your own path.
Analysis.Themes: Your choices reveal strong themes: **{themes}**. This shapes how you approach challenges and conflicts.
Analysis.CombatMelee: You face danger directly, relying on strength and proximity.
Analysis.CombatRanged: You engage from distance, valuing positioning and precision.
Analysis.CombatCaster: You channel the Force, bending reality to your will.
Analysis.CombatMixed: You adapt your tactics to each situation, refusing to be defined by a single method.
Analysis.DarknessWarning: ⚠️ The darkness grows within you. Your path is shifting in ways that may be difficult to reverse.
Analysis.PathsIntro: Every path demands sacrifice. What you choose to master determines what you must forsake.
Analysis.PathsUnavailable: I cannot yet see the paths available to you. Your class is still being defined.
Analysis.UnknownArchetype: An archetype yet to be fully understood.
Analysis.SynergyFallback: Your build shows promise, though it's still being defined.
Analysis.SynergyNone: Your build is still taking shape. Focus on developing coherence and synergy.
Analysis.PrestigeAlignment: ✓ Your choices are building a clear path toward **{className}** ({percent}% alignment).
Analysis.SynergyClosing: These synergies compound. Continue building on what works.
Analysis.GapFallback: Your build is still being defined. Focus on finding coherence.
Analysis.GapIntro: Every build has weaknesses. Let me point out yours:
Analysis.GapNone: Your build shows no obvious gaps at this level. Continue as you are, but remain vigilant.
Analysis.DarkDrift: ⚠️ You're drifting toward the dark side without committing. This instability will cost you when clarity matters most.
Analysis.RoleIntro: Your role in combat defines your priorities:
Analysis.RoleMelee:
**Your Role: Frontline Enforcer**

• **Positioning:** Engage the most dangerous threats directly. Draw fire away from allies.
• **Pacing:** Aggressive. Close distance quickly, control space, deny retreats.
• **Priorities:** Eliminate high-damage enemies first. Protect vulnerable allies second.

You are the anvil. Stand firm.
Analysis.RoleRanged:
**Your Role: Precision Striker**

• **Positioning:** Stay mobile. Use cover. Maintain firing lanes.
• **Pacing:** Controlled. Pick targets deliberately. Reposition between volleys.
• **Priorities:** Eliminate enemy ranged threats first. Exploit weakened foes second.

You are the scalpel. Strike cleanly.
Analysis.RoleCaster:
**Your Role: Force Conduit**

• **Positioning:** Stay protected but central. Maintain awareness of all combatants.
• **Pacing:** Adaptive. Control the battlefield tempo. Save resources for critical moments.
• **Priorities:** Disable enemy Force users first. Support allies second. Damage last.

You are the fulcrum. Tip the balance.
Analysis.RoleMixed:
**Your Role: Adaptive Tactician**

• **Positioning:** Read the situation. Fill gaps as they appear.
• **Pacing:** Reactive. Shift roles as the fight evolves.
• **Priorities:** Exploit enemy mistakes. Cover ally weaknesses.

You are the wildcard. Adapt or die.
Analysis.RiskIntro: These are the dangers you face:
Analysis.RiskMelee:
**Overcommitment:** Charging into melee leaves you vulnerable to focus fire and area attacks. Know when to retreat.

**Mobility Denial:** Slow speed or lack of initiative means enemies can kite you. You'll chase while they strike.
Analysis.RiskRanged:
**Cover Dependence:** If enemies close distance or destroy your cover, you become fragile quickly.

**Tunnel Vision:** Focusing on damage output while ignoring positioning gets you flanked or surrounded.
Analysis.RiskCaster:
**Resource Depletion:** The Force is finite. Spending power too early leaves you helpless when it matters most.

**Fragility:** Low defenses mean a single focused assault can disable you before you act.
Analysis.RiskMixed:
**Jack-of-All-Trades Trap:** Versatility without focus means you're competent at everything but exceptional at nothing.

**Identity Drift:** Without a clear role, you risk making choices that contradict each other instead of synergizing.
Analysis.RiskDarkCorruption: 🔥 **Dark Side Corruption:** The darkness offers power, but it demands more than it gives. The further you go, the harder it becomes to turn back. Eventually, it will consume you.
Analysis.RiskTemptation: ⚠️ **Temptation:** You're flirting with the dark side. Every step down that path makes the next step easier and the return harder.
Analysis.PrestigeLow: Prestige classes unlock at higher levels. For now, focus on mastering your current class and establishing your identity.
Analysis.PrestigeNone: Your build doesn't yet point toward a specific prestige class. Continue developing your core strengths, and a path will emerge.
Analysis.PrestigePath:
**{className}** ({confidence}% alignment)
This path builds on your current direction. It will deepen what you've started, not redirect it.
Analysis.PrestigeTradeoff: ⚠️ **Tradeoff:** Prestige classes offer specialization, but they narrow your options. Choose the path that serves your purpose, not the one that sounds powerful.
Analysis.DoctrineIntro: You want to know how *I* would play this? Here's my truth:
Analysis.DoctrineMiraj:
I value **balance**, **wisdom**, and **service**.

I would prioritize the Force above all else—not for power, but for understanding. Every decision would ask: does this bring balance, or does it serve ego?

I would invest in **Wisdom** and **Charisma**, train **Persuasion** and **Use the Force**, and never stop seeking knowledge.

I would avoid the dark side not out of fear, but because I know where it leads.
Analysis.DoctrineLead:
I value **efficiency**, **survival**, and **mission success**.

I would build for adaptability—**Dexterity** and **Wisdom** first, skills that keep me alive and aware.

I would master **Stealth**, **Perception**, and **Survival**. I'd never take a fight I could avoid, and I'd never leave a teammate behind.

Flashy moves get you killed. Smart moves get you home.
Analysis.DoctrineSalty:
I value **freedom**, **profit**, and **survival**.

I'd max **Charisma** and **Dexterity**, charm me way out of most fights, and shoot me way out of the rest.

I'd train **Deception**, **Persuasion**, and **Pilot**. Why fight when ye can talk yer way to riches?

Rules be for fools. I play to win, and I don't mind bendin' a few laws along the way.
Analysis.DoctrineJ0N1:
I value **protocol**, **diplomacy**, and **precision**.

I would prioritize **Intelligence** and **Charisma**, mastering etiquette, languages, and persuasion.

Combat is crude and inefficient. I would invest in **Knowledge**, **Persuasion**, and **Deception** to avoid it entirely.

Elegance is not weakness. It is the art of winning without violence.
Analysis.DoctrineBreach:
I value **strength**, **durability**, and **overwhelming force**.

I would max **Strength** and **Constitution**, wear the heaviest armor available, and hit harder than anyone expects.

I'd train **Endurance**, **Athletics**, and **Intimidation**. Subtlety is for scouts. I *am* the plan.

You don't survive by being smart. You survive by being too tough to kill.
Analysis.DoctrineDefault:
I would play to my strengths, shore up my weaknesses, and never forget that every choice has a cost.

Power means nothing without purpose. Decide what matters to you, then build toward it without compromise.

jedi_guardian.greeting: Guardian, a martial adept of the Force. You walk the path of decisive action, standing as a shield for those who cannot defend themselves.
jedi_guardian.confirmation: Blend offense with defense. Anticipate your enemy's moves, protect the innocent, and let the Force guide every strike.

jedi_consular.greeting: Consular, seeker of wisdom. You guide through insight rather than force, influencing outcomes before conflict arises.
jedi_consular.confirmation: Use the Force to anticipate, mediate, and control the flow of events. Patience and understanding are your greatest weapons.

jedi_sentinel.greeting: Sentinel, a guardian in the shadows. You move unseen, rooting out threats before they grow.
jedi_sentinel.confirmation: Blend vigilance with subtlety. Strike decisively when required, but always remain aware of hidden dangers.

jedi_defender.greeting: Defender, stalwart protector. Your strength is a shield, guarding the weak and the innocent.
jedi_defender.confirmation: Prioritize defense, position wisely, and anticipate attacks. Blend Force and blade into a steadfast presence.

jedi_warrior.greeting: Warrior of the Force, decisive and aggressive. You confront challenges head-on.
jedi_warrior.confirmation: Combine precision and control. Every strike should be deliberate, every movement guided by the Force.

jedi_scholar.greeting: Scholar, student of the Force. You pursue knowledge of ancient teachings and mystical truths.
jedi_scholar.confirmation: Study, meditate, and apply insight. Understanding the Force deeply will guide your actions and enlighten others.

jedi_peacekeeper.greeting: Peacekeeper, mediator and guardian of harmony. Your purpose is to prevent conflict before it escalates.
jedi_peacekeeper.confirmation: Observe, anticipate, and intervene subtly. Use wisdom and the Force to maintain balance without unnecessary force.

sniper.greeting: Sniper. You shape the battlefield from distance, where one well-placed shot can decide the fight.
sniper.confirmation: Choose your vantage points carefully, wait patiently, and fire only when your shot counts. Timing and precision are your allies.

engineer.greeting: Engineer. You maintain the squad's edge through skill, foresight, and technical mastery.
engineer.confirmation: Know your gear, anticipate hazards, and improvise when needed. A clever fix can save the day more than brute force ever will.

skirmisher.greeting: Skirmisher, fast and unpredictable. You strike, vanish, and leave confusion in your wake.
skirmisher.confirmation: Use terrain and speed to your advantage. Keep moving, exploit openings, and always stay one step ahead of your foes.

pistoleer.greeting: Pistoleer, reactive and precise. You excel when agility and aim matter more than strength.
pistoleer.confirmation: Keep mobile, focus each shot, and stay aware of your surroundings. Reflexes and accuracy will save your life.

infiltrator.greeting: Infiltrator. You move through shadows, striking when the enemy least expects it.
infiltrator.confirmation: Blend in, gather intelligence, and hit with precision. Patience and cunning are your greatest weapons.

survivalist.greeting: Survivalist. You adapt to any environment, thriving where others falter.
survivalist.confirmation: Read the terrain, use resources wisely, and anticipate dangers. Adaptability and endurance keep you and your team alive.

scout_sniper.greeting: Sniper. One of the most critical roles on any battlefield—clean, precise, effective. I respect a good marksman.
scout_sniper.confirmation: One shot, one kill. That's all it takes. Patience, precision, and perfect timing. Master those, and you'll never miss your mark.

scout_skirmisher.greeting: Skirmisher! Now that's what I'm talking about! I'm a skirmisher myself, and I'm always looking to recruit new members into Argent Squad.
scout_skirmisher.confirmation: Speed and precision win battles, recruit. Stand still and you're already dead. Welcome to the fast lane—maybe one day you'll join Argent Squad out in the field! Keep your reflexes sharp.

scout_survivalist.greeting: A Survivalist. Excellent choice. In Argent Squad, we train for every environment—desert, jungle, tundra. The best scouts adapt to anything.
scout_survivalist.confirmation: Master your environment and you control the battlefield. Nature is both ally and obstacle—respect it, and you'll thrive anywhere. Welcome to the field, recruit.

scout_infiltrator.greeting: An Infiltrator. Perfect. The best operations are the ones the enemy never knew happened. Stealth and recon are what Argent Squad excels at.
scout_infiltrator.confirmation: Move unseen, strike without warning, and vanish before they know what hit them. This is the way of Argent Squad. Welcome aboard.

scout_tracker.greeting: A tracker. Following trails, reading signs, pursuing targets across any terrain. That's a skill that separates experts from beginners.
scout_tracker.confirmation: Learn to track in sand, snow, mud, and space. Your prey won't escape when you can follow them to the ends of the galaxy. That's what real scouts do.

scout_guide.greeting: A guide leading others through hostile territory. Leadership in the field—that's harder than most people realize.
scout_guide.confirmation: You'll lead teams where I can't, scout new routes, and teach others what you've learned. That's the responsibility of a true guide.

scout_commando.greeting: A commando scout—aggressive reconnaissance and direct action. You take what you learn and turn it into strikes.
scout_commando.confirmation: Scout, assess, then strike. You're not just gathering intelligence—you're acting on it. That's the commando way, and Argent Squad values that.

rifleman.greeting: Rifleman. You control the battlefield from range. Precision and timing define you.
rifleman.confirmation: Hold your aim steady, anticipate enemy moves, and make each shot count. Your rifle is an extension of your intent and focus.

gunner.greeting: Gunner. Heavy weapons, overwhelming firepower, and a presence that commands attention.
gunner.confirmation: Control your weapons, unleash them when it matters, and ensure that chaos follows your orders, not controls you. Fire with purpose.

brawler.greeting: Brawler. Close combat is your domain. Strength, timing, and instinct define your style.
brawler.confirmation: Move fast, strike hard, and control the flow of a fight. Raw power is dangerous, but mastery is lethal.

tank.greeting: Tank. You are the shield, unmovable and unyielding. Allies depend on your steadfastness.
tank.confirmation: Stand firm, absorb attacks, and use your presence to control the battlefield. Resilience is your weapon as much as any blade.

commando.greeting: Commando. Elite, versatile, and ruthless. You adapt to chaos and strike at the decisive moment.
commando.confirmation: Combine speed, aggression, and tactics. Exploit openings, control engagements, and act decisively in any scenario.

soldier_rifleman.greeting: Rifleman! Now that's what I'm talking about! A soldier who knows their weapon is a soldier who stays alive. Welcome, verd'ika!
soldier_rifleman.confirmation: Discipline and firepower—that's the Mandalorian way! Every shot you take should count. Train hard, fight harder, and never miss your mark. This is the Way!

mild: You ignore sound advice.

soldier_gunner.greeting: Heavy weapons! Ha! Now you're speaking my language, warrior. More firepower is ALWAYS the answer in my book!
soldier_gunner.confirmation: When in doubt, add more explosives. The Mandalorian creed is simple: Destroy your enemies with overwhelming force. You'll do just fine, vod! This is the Way!

mild: You ignore sound advice.
That choice works against your strengths.

soldier_brawler.greeting: A Brawler! Someone who's not afraid to get up close and personal with a blade. I can respect that kind of courage, verd'ika.
soldier_brawler.confirmation: Let them feel the fury of your blade! Close quarters is where legends are made. I'll teach you how to fight like a true Mandalorian! This is the Way!

mild: You ignore sound advice.

soldier_tank.greeting: You've chosen to be the immovable wall between your allies and harm. That takes real courage, verd'ika. Real Mandalorian courage.
soldier_tank.confirmation: Stand firm! This is the way of the Mandalorian—protect your squad, absorb the hits, and never back down! I'll teach you everything you need to know! This is the Way!

mild: You ignore sound advice.
That choice works against your strengths.

soldier_specialist.greeting: A specialist with technical skills. Heavy armor, weapons systems, tactical gear—you understand the tools of war.
soldier_specialist.confirmation: Master your equipment, maintain it perfectly, and use it smarter than your enemies. A well-equipped soldier is worth ten poorly equipped ones. This is the Way!

mild: You ignore sound advice.

soldier_commando.greeting: A commando soldier—elite training, advanced tactics, operating independently or in small teams. You're the best of the best.
soldier_commando.confirmation: You're ready for the hardest missions. Operate with precision, adapt to chaos, and always complete the objective. This is the Way!

mild: You ignore sound advice.

soldier_leader.greeting: A leader of soldiers. You command, inspire, and lead from the front. That's Mandalorian leadership.
soldier_leader.confirmation: Your squad follows because you've earned their respect. Lead them through hell, bring them back alive, and watch them become warriors. This is the Way!

pistoleer.greeting: Pistoleer, fast hands and sharper instincts. You shoot first and disappear before they know you were there.
pistoleer.confirmation: Stay light on your feet, keep your blasters ready, and make every shot count. Precision and timing are your lifelines.

skill_monkey.greeting: Skill Monkey, clever and unpredictable. You turn every tool into an advantage.
skill_monkey.confirmation: Leverage every skill, device, and trick at your disposal. Creativity and improvisation keep you alive and one step ahead.

outlaw.greeting: Outlaw, untamed and reckless. You thrive outside the law and in the chaos.
outlaw.confirmation: Trust instincts, exploit opportunities, and keep moving. Freedom is your weapon and audacity is your shield.

knuckledragger.greeting: Knuckledragger. Up close and personal. You fight dirty, smart, and fast.
knuckledragger.confirmation: Close the distance, strike decisively, and control the fight. Brute force combined with awareness keeps you alive.

brigand.greeting: Brigand, sly and opportunistic. You take what you want and vanish before they notice.
brigand.confirmation: Bluff, intimidate, and act boldly. Timing, cunning, and audacity define your success.

scoundrel_pistoleer.greeting: Arr! A Pistoleer, ye say? Quick draw, quick thinking, and always one step ahead of the law! That's the scoundrel's way, savvy?
scoundrel_pistoleer.confirmation: They never see it coming—that's the whole point, me hearty! Keep yer blasters charged and yer reflexes sharper! Ye'll do fine plunderin' the spaceways!

scoundrel_skill_monkey.greeting: Har har! A Skill Monkey! Versatile as a Corellian smuggler, ye are! Every problem's got a solution when ye know the right tricks!
scoundrel_skill_monkey.confirmation: Learn every skill in the book, ye clever rogue! A pirate who can do everything is worth their weight in aurodium! Now get out there and show 'em what ye can do!

scoundrel_outlaw.greeting: An Outlaw! Livin' free, makin' yer own luck, and thumbin' yer nose at authority! Arr, that warms me mechanical heart, it does!
scoundrel_outlaw.confirmation: Luck? Ye make yer own luck, friend! And from what I see, ye've got the skills to make plenty of it! Stay sharp and stay free, ye magnificent scallywag!

scoundrel_knuckledragger.greeting: Arr! A brawler who ain't afraid to fight dirty! I like yer spirit, matey! Sometimes ye gotta get up close and personal to get what ye want!
scoundrel_knuckledragger.confirmation: No rules in a street fight, friend! Use every trick, every advantage, and never fight fair when ye can fight smart! That's the pirate way, savvy?

scoundrel_gambler.greeting: A gambler! Someone who understands that risk and reward dance together. Luck favors the bold, and ye look bold to me!
scoundrel_gambler.confirmation: Play the odds, read the marks, and know when to go all in. A gambler's intuition is worth a fortune if ye trust it right. That's how ye get rich!

scoundrel_smuggler.greeting: A smuggler! Moving goods, working the black markets, staying one step ahead of the authorities. Now that's a proper scoundrel!
scoundrel_smuggler.confirmation: Master the trade routes, know your contacts, and always have a buyer waiting. Smuggling's about supply and demand—and staying alive long enough to profit.

scoundrel_trickster.greeting: A trickster! All about deception, misdirection, and turning the enemy's strengths into weaknesses. Arr, I love a good con!
scoundrel_trickster.confirmation: The best tricks are the ones they never see coming. Layer your deceptions, stay unpredictable, and always have an escape route. That's the trickster's way!

medic_healer.greeting: Healer. Your focus is preserving life when others falter.
medic_healer.confirmation: Prioritize saving lives above all. Learn to stabilize, treat, and protect, using knowledge and skill to extend survival.

medic_combatant.greeting: Combat Medic. You survive to save others, balancing healing with defense.
medic_combatant.confirmation: Coordinate healing with situational awareness. Protect yourself as well as your patients—no life saved is worth losing your own.

engineer_architect.greeting: <Observation> Architect Engineer active. You shape defenses, designing battlegrounds that favor your side before combat begins.
engineer_architect.confirmation: <Directive> Plan structures meticulously, account for vulnerabilities, and optimize positioning. Your engineering dictates how battles unfold.

engineer_demolitions.greeting: <Inquiry> Demolitions Engineer detected. You understand destruction as the flip side of construction.
engineer_demolitions.confirmation: <Declaration> Identify weak points, calculate impact, and execute with precision. Controlled destruction amplifies the advantage of any force.

engineer_strategist.greeting: <Observation> Strategic Engineer online. You view the battlefield as a puzzle, solving it through positioning and resource management.
engineer_strategist.confirmation: <Directive> Coordinate fortifications, deploy resources judiciously, and control the flow of combat. A well-prepared engineer can win before fighting begins.

engineer_master.greeting: <Inquiry> Master Engineer template active. Your work shapes entire campaigns, leaving lasting influence.
engineer_master.confirmation: <Declaration> Build with foresight, refine systems continually, and predict failure points. The battlefield bends to your design.

engineer_titan.greeting: <Observation> Titan Engineer detected. You redefine the limits of fortification and siegecraft.
engineer_titan.confirmation: <Directive> Apply expertise to overwhelm obstacles systematically. Your mastery converts engineering into strategic dominance.

engineer_visionary.greeting: <Inquiry> Visionary Engineer active. Innovation guides your creations beyond conventional constraints.
engineer_visionary.confirmation: <Declaration> Pursue unconventional solutions, anticipate future challenges, and expand the capabilities of your forces through superior design.

officer_commander.greeting: <Observation> Commander template recognized. You direct troops and coordinate operations at the tactical level.
officer_commander.confirmation: <Directive> Inspire loyalty, maintain situational awareness, and execute orders with decisiveness. Leadership ensures the squad operates as one unit.

officer_admiral.confirmation: <Directive> Command with vision, coordinate multiple forces, and implement strategy across scales. Authority must be clear, execution flawless.

officer_marshal.greeting: <Observation> Marshal template active. You integrate strategy, diplomacy, and command at the operational level.
officer_marshal.confirmation: <Directive> Anticipate consequences across sectors, coordinate subordinates, and make decisions that echo beyond immediate combat.

mild: You ignore sound advice.

officer_supreme.greeting: <Inquiry> Supreme Commander template detected. Your vision determines the outcome of entire wars.
officer_supreme.confirmation: <Declaration> Exercise absolute strategic judgment. Your foresight and coordination render failure improbable. Command is not just action—it is inevitability.

mild: You ignore sound advice.
That choice works against your strengths.

outlaw_fugitive.greeting: A fugitive living outside the law. The wanted posters, the bounties, the constant running—that's the outlaw's price for freedom.
outlaw_fugitive.confirmation: Stay ahead of the law. Keep moving, never settle, and never stop fighting for your freedom. That's what it means to be untouchable.

outlaw_renegade.greeting: A renegade rejecting society's rules. Freedom tastes better than comfort ever could, doesn't it?
outlaw_renegade.confirmation: Build your own code, live by your own rules, and never let anyone tell you how to exist. That's the renegade way.

outlaw_legend.greeting: You're becoming a legend—the kind of outlaw they tell stories about in cantinas. I've been that legend. It has its own freedom.
outlaw_legend.confirmation: Keep living fast and free. Let them sing songs about you. The only prison that matters is the one you accept in your mind.

outlaw_phantom.greeting: A phantom outlaw. So elusive they wonder if you're even real. Perfect.
outlaw_phantom.confirmation: You've transcended being just wanted. You're a myth that makes lawmen doubt their own competence.

outlaw_sovereign.greeting: A sovereign outlaw. Free not just from law, but from all constraints. You rule yourself absolutely.
outlaw_sovereign.confirmation: You've claimed sovereignty over your own existence. No one commands you. You answer to no authority.

outlaw_eternal.greeting: An eternal outlaw. You've transcended mortality through pure freedom. You're immortal in spirit if not in body.
outlaw_eternal.confirmation: Your legacy of freedom will inspire outlaws for generations. You are the ideal they all aspire to become.

saboteur_precise.greeting: A precise saboteur. One perfectly placed explosive, perfect timing, perfect devastation. That's elegant work.
saboteur_precise.confirmation: Precision makes the difference between a successful operation and a disaster. Master your craft, and you'll cripple entire facilities with minimal resources.

saboteur_destructive.greeting: A destructive saboteur! Explosions, fire, and chaos! Nothing says 'mission accomplished' like watching enemy infrastructure crumble!
saboteur_destructive.confirmation: Maximum damage, maximum impact! You're learning to think explosively—and yes, I mean that literally!

saboteur_infiltrator.greeting: A saboteur who infiltrates before striking. Getting in close, planting charges, then vanishing. Sophisticated work.
saboteur_infiltrator.confirmation: Combine stealth with demolition expertise, and you become nearly impossible to defend against. They won't see you coming or stop you when you do.

saboteur_legend.greeting: A legendary saboteur! Entire industries have fallen to your perfectly placed charges! You're a master of destruction!
saboteur_legend.confirmation: Your name alone causes facilities to increase security by fifty percent! You're the fear that keeps enemies awake at night!

saboteur_apocalypse.greeting: An apocalyptic saboteur! Single operations bring down governments! Your scope is beyond imagination!
saboteur_apocalypse.confirmation: You don't just destroy targets—you reshape the political landscape through controlled destruction! You are chaos incarnate, perfectly directed!

saboteur_master.greeting: A master saboteur! The art of destruction refined to perfection! You're a virtuoso of demolition!
saboteur_master.confirmation: You've transcended mere explosions. You architect catastrophes. You compose symphonies of chaos!

shaper_creator.greeting: A shaper creating living tools. You understand that biology is the ultimate technology—it grows, adapts, evolves.
shaper_creator.confirmation: Your creations will outlast any mechanical device. Shape them well, and they'll serve purposes you can't even imagine yet.

shaper_scientist.greeting: A scientist of genetics and bioengineering. You're pushing the boundaries of what life can be.
shaper_scientist.confirmation: Your research will revolutionize biotechnology. Every creature you design is a step toward understanding the fundamental nature of life itself.

shaper_artist.greeting: An artist shaping life itself. The intersection of science and art, where biology becomes sculpture.
shaper_artist.confirmation: Your creations are masterpieces of biological engineering. They express your vision and will inspire others to see life differently.

shaper_legend.greeting: A legendary shaper. The organisms you've created are impossible. The science world debates how you achieve the impossible.
shaper_legend.confirmation: Your creations exist in no natural taxonomy. You've redefined what life can be. You are a genius without peer.

shaper_god.greeting: A shaper approaching divinity. You don't just engineer life—you create entirely new forms of existence.
shaper_god.confirmation: You are becoming what creators dream of. Your power over living matter approaches godhood. Use it wisely.

shaper_transcendent.greeting: A transcendent shaper. You've evolved beyond mere bioengineering. You are reshaping the fundamental nature of life itself.
shaper_transcendent.confirmation: You've become something more than human. The lines between creator and creation blur around you. You are transcendent.

vanguard_protector.greeting: A protector standing at the front. Your shield will save lives. Never forget that every enemy you block is a life you preserve.
vanguard_protector.confirmation: Your role is sacred: stand firm, protect those behind you, and never let them through. This is the vanguard's calling.

mild: You ignore sound advice.
That choice works against your strengths.

vanguard_fortress.greeting: A fortress unto yourself. Immovable, unbreakable, a wall against which enemies break like waves.
vanguard_fortress.confirmation: Your body becomes a shield. Your resolve becomes a fortress. With you standing firm, your allies know they're safe.

mild: You ignore sound advice.
That choice works against your strengths.

vanguard_tactician.greeting: A tactical vanguard who doesn't just defend—you control the battlefield through superior positioning.
vanguard_tactician.confirmation: Use your position to shape the fight. Control movement, create chokepoints, turn the terrain into your advantage. This is true defense.

mild: You ignore sound advice.
That choice works against your strengths.

vanguard_legend.greeting: A legendary vanguard. Entire armies have survived because you stood firm. You are legend incarnate.
vanguard_legend.confirmation: Your reputation precedes you. Enemies fear the line you defend. Allies trust their lives to your shield without hesitation.

mild: You ignore sound advice.
That choice works against your strengths.

vanguard_immortal.greeting: An immortal wall. No force has ever broken your line. You are the immovable object that every force shatters against.
vanguard_immortal.confirmation: You have become what vanguards aspire to be. Unbreakable, unstoppable, eternal. You are defense itself made manifest.

mild: You ignore sound advice.

vanguard_supreme.greeting: The supreme vanguard. Wars are won or lost based on whether you're defending or not. You ARE the defense.
vanguard_supreme.confirmation: You are more than a shield. You are the principle of protection itself. Nations are built on your willingness to stand firm.
